notes: Strong mechanism node. All referents named (Alex Hormozi, specific emotions: guilt, opulence, entitlement). Standalone and load-bearing: the triple compound mechanism is novel. Type label 'mechanism' correct. Falsifiable via peer exposure experiments. Conditions well-bounded.

Solid assertion. Referent named (Alex Hormozi). Observable framework: behavioral test for self-judgment. Standalone meaning clear. Load-bearing: explains systematic self-deception. Falsifiable: can audit whether subjects exempt themselves from their own standards. Mechanism supplied.

Strong assertion with rich conditions. Referent named (Alex Hormozi). Numbers well-anchored on axis (weekly workout duration: 5 min → 10 min → 10x-100x). Standalone meaning: order-of-magnitude sufficiency principle. Load-bearing: explains why incremental changes fail. Multiple bounded_by conditions properly escape overgeneralization. 7 sources backing.

Clean definition-as-claim. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Novel definition (intelligence = iteration-count-to-behavior-change, not IQ). Standalone and load-bearing: reframes intelligence as rate-based, not fixed trait. Type label 'assertion' appropriate. Falsifiable: count iterations empirically. Bounded well (feedback quality, elapsed time, ceiling assumptions).

Exemplary conditional with quantified axis. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Numbers well-anchored ($2k/mo spend against $1.5k CAC → 2+ months feedback cycle → too slow). Conditions specific (paid ad, target CAC known). Mechanism clear: feedback cadence enables iteration. Falsifiable via A/B spend-level tests. Bounded carefully.

Strong mechanism node on negative reinforcement. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Observable: anger terminates crying, strengthens response despite original intent to comfort. Standalone meaning clear. Load-bearing: explains unintentional conditioning in relationships. Type label 'mechanism' correct. Falsifiable: test whether removing reinforcement removes response. Conditions well-specified.

Solid assertion on equity calculation method. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Observable process: time estimate → income target → revenue multiple → minimum equity floor. Standalone meaning: back-solving framework. Load-bearing: operationalizes equity negotiation. Type label 'assertion' correct. Falsifiable: compare back-solved floors to actual market deals. Conditions appropriate (equity/revenue-share context, time/income estimable).

Strong comparison node. Referent: Albert (Shiny.ai). Numbers well-anchored on LTV axis: ~$1k/mo retainer baseline vs. ~$240k actual result-based LTV. Specific conditions (lead reactivation, CRM-trackable results). Standalone meaning: result-based pricing structure comparison. Load-bearing: justifies pricing model choice. Type label 'comparison' correct. Falsifiable via LTV audit. Bounded on applicability (hard-to-track results, 50+ clients).

Clean metaphorical assertion. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Observable: trust = accepting punishment risk for relational benefit. Standalone meaning clear. Load-bearing: reframes trust as decision-theoretic, not emotional. Type label 'assertion' correct (though 'metaphor' could have strengthened). Falsifiable: test whether trust-extension correlates with punishment-risk acceptance. No problematic ambiguity.

Strong quantified assertion. Referent: Alex Hormozi. Numbers anchored on input-multiple axis: 1x baseline (gym-running) vs. 10,000x (Acquisition.com leverage). Standalone meaning: leverage compounds input through others' work. Load-bearing: explains scaling without 10,000x personal effort. Type label 'quantified' correct. Falsifiable: audit hours/output across phases. Bounded appropriately (personal trajectory, individual variance).
